title: Rhythm: full punctuation paragraph
description: Rhythm exercise with full punctuation toolkit — find your tempo
text: today, she said: "i'll write a long-form article." he replied, "that's brave!" they laughed; the day went on; work was done.

tips.text: Mix of all punctuation you've learned
Quoted dialogue is great rhythm practice

tips.target: today, she said: "i'll write a long-form article." he replied,

tips.text: Enable metronome — 27 BPM equivalent at 5 chars/word

tips.target: "that's brave!" they laughed; the day went on; work was done.

character_tips.anna: All your punctuation — in one paragraph. Stay smooth.
character_tips.maxim: Real writing is mostly this — alternating punctuation and words. Pro-level rhythm.
